IBK TV – Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 8, 2026

IBK TV ("we", "our", or "the app") is a free live streaming application providing access to West African television channels. This privacy policy explains how we handle your information.

1. Information We Collect

IBK TV does not collect, store, or share any personal information. Specifically:

  • No account or registration is required
  • No name, email, or contact information is collected
  • No location data is collected
  • No usage analytics or tracking is performed
  • No advertising SDKs are used

2. Local Storage

The app saves your favorite channels and recently watched channels locally on your device only. This data never leaves your device and is not transmitted to any server.

3. Third-Party Streams

IBK TV plays live video streams from third-party broadcasters. When you watch a channel, your device connects directly to the broadcaster's streaming server. We do not control and are not responsible for the privacy practices of those third-party servers.

4. Internet Permission

The app requires internet access solely to load and play live television streams. No other network communication occurs.

5. Children's Privacy

IBK TV is intended for general audiences and does not target children under 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children.

6. Changes to This Policy

If we make changes to this policy, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.

7. Contact

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, contact us at: ibktv.app@gmail.com
